Index.title: Digital systems that help service businesses grow
Index.description: Growonio designs modern websites, smarter booking flows, and practical automation systems that turn more visitors into clients and reduce manual work.
Index.supportingLine: Built for service businesses in Romania and beyond, with bilingual delivery, SEO-ready structure, and admin-friendly systems from day one.
Index.metaTitle: Business Automation for Service Businesses in Romania
Index.metaDescription: Growonio builds conversion-focused websites, automations, booking systems, and digital workflows for service businesses growing in Romania.
Index.servicesPreviewDesc: End-to-end digital solutions tailored to your growth.
Index.workPreviewDesc: A glimpse into our recent digital transformations.
Index.processDesc: A transparent, milestone-driven approach to delivery.
Index.trustDesc: We build scalable foundations, not just websites.
Index.processStep1Desc: We analyze your business bottlenecks and map out a digital strategy.
Index.processStep2Desc: We build your custom architecture with transparent milestone updates.
Index.processStep3Desc: Deployment, training, and ongoing support to accelerate growth.
Index.ctaDesc: Let's talk about how our transparent process and modern tech stack can elevate your business.
Index.heroVisualTitle: From first inquiry to cleaner operations
Index.heroVisualDescription: A Growonio project is built like a branching system: better lead capture, clearer booking flow, stronger client handling, and reporting-ready foundations.

ServicesPage.title: Our Services
ServicesPage.description: Digital solutions built to help businesses grow, streamline operations, and convert more visitors into clients.
ServicesPage.supportingLine: From modern websites to booking systems and workflow automation, we build practical digital systems for service businesses in Romania and beyond.
ServicesPage.metaTitle: Business Website Design, Booking Systems & Automation | Growonio
ServicesPage.metaDescription: Growonio builds business websites, booking systems, lead capture flows, and automation solutions for service businesses in Romania.
ServicesPage.heroPanelDescription: We combine clear messaging, search-ready structure, admin control, and practical workflows so the final system keeps working after launch, not just on day one.
ServicesPage.servicesSectionTitle: Core services for modern service businesses
ServicesPage.servicesSectionDescription: Growonio keeps the offer focused: four core service areas that help businesses present themselves better online, manage demand more efficiently, and reduce manual operational work.
ServicesPage.webDesignDesc: Modern, high-performing websites built to help businesses look credible, rank better, and turn visitors into inquiries.
ServicesPage.bookingDesc: Scheduling and client-handling systems that reduce manual work, organize requests, and improve the customer journey.
ServicesPage.automationDesc: Smarter lead capture and workflow automation that helps businesses respond faster, reduce repetitive tasks, and miss fewer opportunities.
ServicesPage.mobileDesc: Custom mobile solutions for customer-facing experiences or internal business workflows when web alone is not enough.
ServicesPage.includedIntro: Our work goes beyond visual design. We build digital systems with the structure, tools, and flexibility businesses need to launch, manage content, and grow over time.
ServicesPage.includedNote: Capabilities are combined based on project scope, so you get one coherent system instead of disconnected add-ons.
ServicesPage.industriesIntro: Growonio is best suited for businesses that need a stronger online presence, better lead handling, smoother booking flows, or less manual operational work.

industryItems.title: Salons & Beauty Businesses
industryItems.description: Websites, service menus, and booking flows designed to help clients book faster and return more often.

industryItems.title: Clinics & Appointment-Based Services
industryItems.description: Clear service presentation and structured scheduling systems that reduce front-desk friction.

industryItems.title: Consultants & Service Firms
industryItems.description: Credible digital presence and lead flows that support qualification, follow-up, and client trust.

industryItems.title: Local Service Businesses
industryItems.description: Practical digital setups for businesses that rely on local visibility, trust, and fast inquiry handling.

ServicesPage.processIntro: Every project follows a practical sequence so strategy, design, and implementation stay aligned with real business goals.

processSteps.title: Discover
processSteps.description: We review your business goals, service flow, bottlenecks, and what the website or system needs to improve.

processSteps.title: Plan
processSteps.description: We define the page structure, user journey, required tools, and delivery scope before development starts.

processSteps.title: Build
processSteps.description: We design and develop the solution with responsive implementation, admin access, and a search-ready structure.

processSteps.title: Launch & Support
processSteps.description: We test, launch, and support the handover so your team can use the system with confidence from day one.

ServicesPage.ctaTitle: Need a solution tailored to your business?
ServicesPage.ctaText: We help businesses launch modern websites, smarter booking flows, and practical automation systems built around real operational needs.

PricingPage.title: Transparent Pricing
PricingPage.description: Clear starting packages for modern websites, booking systems, and business tools.
PricingPage.metaTitle: Pricing for Business Automation and Growth Systems
PricingPage.metaDescription: Review Growonio pricing for websites, automation systems, and growth-focused digital services for service businesses in Romania.
PricingPage.customProjectsDesc: For mobile apps, advanced dashboards, and tailored automation workflows.
PricingPage.careGrowthFeatures: Everything in Basic|Priority update requests|Ongoing improvements
PricingPage.carePlusFeatures: Everything in Growth|Higher-priority support|More active monthly help
PricingPage.infraNote: Domain registration, hosting/platform costs, business email, and third-party subscriptions are not included by default unless clearly listed in the quote. For simple websites, a low-cost initial setup may be possible.
PricingPage.faq1A: Hosting is not automatically included with all packages to allow flexibility. However, we can set up, manage, and scale your cloud infrastructure depending on your specific needs.
PricingPage.faq2A: Domain registration is handled separately to ensure you have full ownership. We'll guide you through the process of purchasing and configuring the right domain.
PricingPage.faq3Q: Can I start small and upgrade later?
PricingPage.faq3A: Yes. Our systems are built to scale. You can start with LaunchPad and upgrade to a FlowSite or OpsCore structure as your business operations grow.
PricingPage.faq4A: Yes, we offer structured Care plans starting from €59/month for businesses that want ongoing technical monitoring, updates, and priority support.
PricingPage.faq5Q: Why are prices shown in EUR?
PricingPage.faq5A: We display pricing in EUR as the standard currency for software and digital services in the region, but invoices can be issued in RON at the official exchange rate.
PricingPage.faq6Q: Can Growonio manage hosting and business email?
PricingPage.faq6A: Yes, we can manage your complete digital infrastructure including cloud hosting and Google Workspace or Microsoft 365 business email for an additional tailored fee.
PricingPage.finalCtaTitle: Let’s choose the right setup for your business
